{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Winter’s Blade sect
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Winter’s Blade sect]] was once pitted against the [[Seishen Kingdom]] by [[Akura Charity]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
